policy: Record policy, plan, and governance epochs without rewriting historical artifacts. The manifest is the audit source; selected epochs also receive immutable annotated Git tags.

epochs.description: Hypothesis-led IMPLEMENT_PLAN.md v2 replaced the legacy experiment-number execution order.
Gamma aggregation validation switched to diagnostic-only policy gates before any strategy use.
Fable 5 Technical DD remediation epoch. Workstream 1 is complete and the purchase freeze is lifted; Workstream 5 remains open only for the user retention-policy decision.
H-A2 targeted geometry data/regime expansion plan remains active. Paid follow-up is allowed only after the section 5 decision tree, experiment-specific preregistration, and current cost guard pass.
